issue_title: Incorrect Validation of Username and FullName
issue_body_preview:
### Issue Description

If  either the username or the fullname is empty, the data has been saved successfully.

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/f56abcc6-c911-4ebc-af97-73097366dc98



### Steps to Reproduce

go to settings, 
make username or full name empty,
save the changes

### Ex
test_description_zh: 进入用户设置页面，清空用户名（Username）或全名（FullName）输入框，使其为空，然后点击保存按钮，观察表单验证行为和保存结果。
expected_result_zh: 当用户名或全名为空时，表单应显示验证错误提示，阻止保存操作，数据不应被成功提交。
